svg.title: diplomat-gate: one enforcement layer for four agent frameworks
svg.desc: Flow diagram showing LangChain, OpenClaw, browser-use and OpenAI Agents SDK converging onto diplomat-gate, which emits CONTINUE, REVIEW, or STOP verdicts.
